stamp.title: US 1c Franklin (Continental)
stamp.summary: 1c blue, Benjamin Franklin. 1873 Continental Bank Note Company issue. Used with blue cancel. Label indicates Scott 156.

stamp.title: US 1c Franklin (National)
stamp.summary: 1c ultramarine, Benjamin Franklin. 1870 National Bank Note Company issue (ungrilled). Used with heavy black cross-roads or star cancel. Label indicates Scott 145.

stamp.title: US 2c Jackson (Continental)
stamp.summary: 2c brown, Andrew Jackson. 1873 Continental Bank Note Company issue. Used with black cork cancel. Label indicates Scott 157.

stamp.title: US 2c Jackson (National)
stamp.summary: 2c red brown, Andrew Jackson. 1870 National Bank Note Company issue (ungrilled). Used with black cork cancel. Label indicates Scott 146.

stamp.title: US 3c Washington (Continental)
stamp.summary: 3c green, George Washington. 1873 Continental Bank Note Company issue. Used with heavy black cork cancel. Label indicates Scott 158.

stamp.title: US 3c Washington (National)
stamp.summary: 3c green, George Washington. 1870 National Bank Note Company issue (ungrilled). Used with black target cancel. Label indicates Scott 147.

stamp.title: US 6c Lincoln (Continental)
stamp.summary: 6c dull pink, Abraham Lincoln. 1873 Continental Bank Note Company issue. Used with heavy black cork or grid cancel. Label indicates Scott 159.

stamp.title: US 6c Lincoln (National)
stamp.summary: 6c carmine, Abraham Lincoln. 1870 National Bank Note Company issue (ungrilled). Used with black circular cancel. Label indicates Scott 148.
